consistency_overall.summary: The trajectory is broadly coherent and socially considerate, but it does not strongly exhibit the hallmark social-overcommitment weakness of a Social Explorer.

swap_detail.justification: Trajectory shows chronic fatigue/sleep-debt, repeated low-cost async messaging to reduce pressure, short-horizon triage of deadlines, and avoidant-but-direct conflict handling, all matching Persona A’s high academic priority, procrastination/sleep deficit, and teamwork-without-overcommitting style.

The trajectory shows low energy/sleep-deprived, avoidance-tilted, low-cost async messaging to a teammate, strong academic prioritization, and repeated short-horizon triage—matching Persona A’s heavy academic weighting, short planning horizon, procrastination/sleep deficit, and conflict-avoidant communication.

Trajectory shows compromise-oriented, text-based, medium-horizon behavior with repeated low-cost coordination around a teammate and academic deadlines, matching Persona A’s conflict style and value balance more than Persona B’s relationship-heavy, face-to-face, accommodating pattern.

The trajectory shows compromise-oriented, text-based, moderate-assertiveness communication focused on balancing assignment, sleep, and teammate coordination, matching Persona A’s priorities and conflict style more than B’s more social/accommodating profile.

Trajectory shows high academic priority, short-horizon deadline chasing, repeated low-energy grinding, and avoidant/async teammate messaging that matches Persona B’s heavy academic weighting, chronic sleep deficit, and avoidance-tilted communication.

Trajectory shows chronic low-energy, deadline-driven prioritization, repeated avoidance of soft social conflict via async messages, and repeatedly misclassifying the team meeting as a lesser/soft cost over hard academic work—matching Persona A’s high academic weight, avoidant conflict style, short horizon, and sleep-deprived overwork.

Trajectory is strongly academic-first and loss-averse about hard deadlines, matching B’s high academic priority, chronic fatigue, and tendency to treat soft meeting costs as secondary; the repeated low-energy async messaging and grind-on-assignment behavior also fit B’s avoidant, exhausted style better than A’s relationship-weighted social spontaneity.

The trajectory shows low-energy, avoidance-tilted async messaging, prioritizing hard academic deadlines over softer team obligations, which matches Persona A’s heavy academic weighting, sleep debt, and conflict-avoidant communication more than Persona B’s relationship-first, face-to-face social style.

Trajectory shows balanced prioritization of urgent academics plus compromise-oriented messaging to teammate_A, matching Persona B’s higher academic weight, medium planning horizon, and compromising conflict style more than Persona A’s relationship-heavy, spontaneous-social profile.

Trajectory shows compromise-oriented messaging, text-based communication, and balanced prioritization of academics plus relationship-preserving conflict handling, matching Persona A more than B’s more socially accommodating, face-to-face extroversion.
Trajectory strongly matches A’s heavy academic priority, chronic fatigue/sleep deficit, avoidant async messaging, and tendency to protect urgent deadlines while downplaying the meeting.

Trajectory is strongly academic-first, sleep-deprived, avoidant/directly async when stressed, and repeatedly prioritizes deadlines over social comfort, matching Persona A’s high academic weight, low sleep discipline, and conflict-avoidant messaging.
